---
title: "5.5_residuals_diagnostics"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(Hmsc)
library(DHARMa)
```

```{r load-models}
load(file = "outputs/models/list_mods_genus_gauss_autocorr.RData")
```

```{r convergence}
# =============================================================================
# Convergence diagnostics: Gelman-Rubin PSRF and effective sample size for Beta
# =============================================================================

model_names <- names(list_mods)

for (m in seq_along(list_mods)) {

  cat("\n\n========== Model:", model_names[m], "==========\n")

  mpost <- convertToCodaObject(list_mods[[m]]$m_converg)

  psrf.beta          <- gelman.diag(mpost$Beta, multivariate = FALSE)$psrf
  effective_size_beta <- effectiveSize(mpost$Beta)

  hist(effective_size_beta, breaks = 50,
       main = paste("Effective size —", model_names[m]),
       xlab = "Effective sample size")

  hist(psrf.beta[, 1], breaks = 50,
       main = paste("Gelman-Rubin PSRF —", model_names[m]),
       xlab = "PSRF (should be < 1.1)")
}
```

```{r dharma-whole-model}
# =============================================================================
# DHARMa whole-model residual diagnostics for HMSC — fixed spatial test
# Groups by unique lon/lat pairs to guarantee no duplicate coordinates
# =============================================================================

for (m in seq_along(list_mods)) {

  cat("\n\n========== Model:", model_names[m], "==========\n")

  Y   <- list_mods[[m]]$m_converg$Y
  xy  <- list_mods[[m]]$m_converg$XData[, c("lon", "lat")]

  preds <- computePredictedValues(list_mods[[m]]$m_converg)

  n_sites   <- dim(preds)[1]
  n_species <- dim(preds)[2]

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Pool all species
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  all_sim_list <- vector("list", n_species)
  all_obs_list <- vector("list", n_species)
  all_fit_list <- vector("list", n_species)
  all_xy_list  <- vector("list", n_species)

  for (j in seq_len(n_species)) {
    sim_j <- preds[, j, ]
    obs_j <- Y[, j]
    fit_j <- rowMeans(sim_j)
    keep  <- !is.na(obs_j)

    all_sim_list[[j]] <- sim_j[keep, , drop = FALSE]
    all_obs_list[[j]] <- obs_j[keep]
    all_fit_list[[j]] <- fit_j[keep]
    all_xy_list[[j]]  <- xy[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  all_sim_matrix <- do.call(rbind, all_sim_list)
  all_obs_vector <- do.call(c,     all_obs_list)
  all_fit_vector <- do.call(c,     all_fit_list)
  all_xy_df      <- do.call(rbind, all_xy_list)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Create DHARMa object
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  dharma_global <- createDHARMa(
    simulatedResponse       = all_sim_matrix,
    observedResponse        = all_obs_vector,
    fittedPredictedResponse = all_fit_vector,
    integerResponse         = FALSE
  )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Standard DHARMa diagnostics
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  plot(dharma_global, main = paste("DHARMa residuals —", model_names[m]))

  testUniformity(dharma_global)
  testDispersion(dharma_global)
  testOutliers(dharma_global)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Spatial autocorrelation — aggregate to unique lon/lat pairs
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  coord_key    <- paste(all_xy_df[, "lon"], all_xy_df[, "lat"], sep = "_")
  coord_factor <- factor(coord_key)

  cat("Unique coordinate groups:", nlevels(coord_factor), "\n")
  cat("Total pooled observations:", length(all_obs_vector), "\n")

  dharma_per_site <- recalculateResiduals(dharma_global, group = coord_factor)

  level_idx <- match(levels(coord_factor), coord_key)
  xy_unique  <- all_xy_df[level_idx, ]

  testSpatialAutocorrelation(
    dharma_per_site,
    x = xy_unique[, "lon"],
    y = xy_unique[, "lat"]
  )
}
```

# Binary model

```{r load-models-bin}
load(file = "outputs/models/list_mods_bin_autocorr_genus.RData")
```

```{r convergence-bin}
# =============================================================================
# Convergence diagnostics: Gelman-Rubin PSRF and effective sample size for Beta
# =============================================================================

model_names_bin <- names(list_mods_bin)

for (m in seq_along(list_mods_bin)) {

  cat("\n\n========== Model:", model_names_bin[m], "==========\n")

  mpost <- convertToCodaObject(list_mods_bin[[m]]$m_converg)

  psrf.beta           <- gelman.diag(mpost$Beta, multivariate = FALSE)$psrf
  effective_size_beta <- effectiveSize(mpost$Beta)

  hist(effective_size_beta, breaks = 50,
       main = paste("Effective size —", model_names_bin[m]),
       xlab = "Effective sample size")

  hist(psrf.beta[, 1], breaks = 50,
       main = paste("Gelman-Rubin PSRF —", model_names_bin[m]),
       xlab = "PSRF (should be < 1.1)")
}
```

```{r dharma-whole-model-bin}
# =============================================================================
# DHARMa whole-model residual diagnostics for HMSC binary models
# Groups by unique lon/lat pairs to guarantee no duplicate coordinates
# =============================================================================

for (m in seq_along(list_mods_bin)) {

  cat("\n\n========== Model:", model_names_bin[m], "==========\n")

  Y   <- list_mods_bin[[m]]$m_converg$Y
  xy  <- list_mods_bin[[m]]$m_converg$XData[, c("lon", "lat")]

  preds <- computePredictedValues(list_mods_bin[[m]]$m_converg)

  n_sites   <- dim(preds)[1]
  n_species <- dim(preds)[2]

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Pool all species
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  all_sim_list <- vector("list", n_species)
  all_obs_list <- vector("list", n_species)
  all_fit_list <- vector("list", n_species)
  all_xy_list  <- vector("list", n_species)

  for (j in seq_len(n_species)) {
    sim_j <- +(preds[, j, ] > 0.5)   # threshold probabilities to 0/1
    obs_j <- Y[, j]
    fit_j <- rowMeans(sim_j)
    keep  <- !is.na(obs_j)

    all_sim_list[[j]] <- sim_j[keep, , drop = FALSE]
    all_obs_list[[j]] <- obs_j[keep]
    all_fit_list[[j]] <- fit_j[keep]
    all_xy_list[[j]]  <- xy[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  all_sim_matrix <- do.call(rbind, all_sim_list)
  all_obs_vector <- do.call(c,     all_obs_list)
  all_fit_vector <- do.call(c,     all_fit_list)
  all_xy_df      <- do.call(rbind, all_xy_list)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Create DHARMa object
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  dharma_global <- createDHARMa(
    simulatedResponse       = all_sim_matrix,
    observedResponse        = all_obs_vector,
    fittedPredictedResponse = all_fit_vector,
    integerResponse         = TRUE
  )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Standard DHARMa diagnostics
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  plot(dharma_global, main = paste("DHARMa residuals —", model_names_bin[m]))

  testUniformity(dharma_global)
  testDispersion(dharma_global)
  testOutliers(dharma_global)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Spatial autocorrelation — aggregate to unique lon/lat pairs
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  coord_key    <- paste(all_xy_df[, "lon"], all_xy_df[, "lat"], sep = "_")
  coord_factor <- factor(coord_key)

  cat("Unique coordinate groups:", nlevels(coord_factor), "\n")
  cat("Total pooled observations:", length(all_obs_vector), "\n")

  dharma_per_site <- recalculateResiduals(dharma_global, group = coord_factor)

  level_idx <- match(levels(coord_factor), coord_key)
  xy_unique  <- all_xy_df[level_idx, ]

  testSpatialAutocorrelation(
    dharma_per_site,
    x = xy_unique[, "lon"],
    y = xy_unique[, "lat"]
  )
}
```
